comments.runtime:current:pearl-opaline:DARK: 替换素材时 以珍珠白为主要配色，去掉城堡
comments.runtime:current:crystal-anime:DARK: 背景太亮，皇室卡卡背中心空
comments.runtime:current:royal-luxury:DARK: 背景要夜间的金碧辉煌的皇宫，目前宫殿黑色元素太多

regenerateSlots.promptConstraints: No text, numbers, Chinese, English, Roman numerals, logos, watermarks, fake glyphs, UI labels, baked cards, baked counters, gameplay controls, hover rings, or selection states. React renders all labels, counts, icons, levels, gems, buttons, and gameplay affordances. Gem panel must be a straight, front-facing, calibratable 5x5 grid of empty wells.

No text, numbers, Chinese, English, Roman numerals, logos, watermarks, fake glyphs, UI labels, baked cards, baked counters, gameplay controls, hover rings, or selection states. React renders all labels, counts, icons, levels, gems, buttons, and gameplay affordances. Shell covers the upper 3840x1640 region only: TopBar plus center play area, with PlayerZone generated separately. Shell may use theme-related landscapes, distant architecture, environment wonders, or natural wonders, but must stay one low-contrast, low-noise wide global background with no strong focal subject, framed panel, tablecloth, playmat, center rectangle, platform, giant sun/moon disk, character, or monster.

No text, numbers, Chinese, English, Roman numerals, logos, watermarks, fake glyphs, UI labels, baked cards, baked counters, gameplay controls, hover rings, or selection states. React renders all labels, counts, icons, levels, gems, buttons, and gameplay affordances. Royal card back must have a complete prestige center focus such as sovereign ornament, crown-like abstract motif, ceremonial medallion, jewel core, or crest-like non-readable geometry; no large empty center.

assertions: deleteSets are complete non-runtime candidate sets rated 1
keepSets are complete non-runtime candidate sets rated 4/7/10
regenerateSlots belong to kept candidate sets or explicitly marked runtime slots
player-zone side-specific sets expand to p1 and p2 targets
